scope: Finish the LM Studio OpenAI-compatible local provider surface for no-auth chat-completions routing, optional bearer auth, local model overrides, and stream health monitoring

rows.source: LM Studio provider profile, local discovery, and OpenAI-compatible shim anchors
requiredBehaviors: send LM Studio requests to the local OpenAI-compatible chat-completions route
omit authorization when no local API key is configured
send optional bearer authorization when LMSTUDIO_API_KEY is configured
disable Responses API routing for LM Studio
edgeCases: request body stream=false for non-stream chat calls

rows.source: LM Studio profile and local endpoint discovery anchors
requiredBehaviors: create the first-class LMStudioProvider through the provider factory
honor LMSTUDIO_MODEL and explicit factory model overrides
honor LMSTUDIO_BASE_URL and default to the local port when unset
fall back to OPENAI_API_KEY and OPENAI_BASE_URL for OpenAI-compatible local setups when LM Studio-specific values are absent
require an explicit model for factory creation when no configured model exists
edgeCases: runtime _deps catalog mirrors the config catalog
commands: npm run test --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime -- src/llm/provider.test.ts src/config/config.test.ts src/llm/models-manager.test.ts

rows.source: Local LM Studio endpoint detection and local-provider stream behavior anchors
requiredBehaviors: wrap LM Studio streaming calls in local health polling
abort long-running streams when LM Studio reports unhealthy
treat ECONNREFUSED from the local endpoint as provider loss
surface provider loss as an lmstudio LLMProviderError

rows.source: OpenAI-compatible model listing and local provider labeling anchors
requiredBehaviors: read live local model metadata from the OpenAI-compatible /models endpoint
label localhost:1234-compatible endpoints as LM Studio
map LM Studio provider aliases to lmstudio, openai, and openai-compatible
keep explicit provider context metadata authoritative over live endpoint discovery
edgeCases: explicit context and output token metadata
